title: eleocharis uniflora
intro: Eleocharis uniflora, also known as Spike-rush, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the sedge family (Cyperaceae). Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which have been utilized to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Eleocharis uniflora include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestive health, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
